associatedMedia.headline: Eilean Donan Castle, Donan, Argyll, Scotland
associatedMedia.description: Eilean Donan Castle is a small tidal island where three sea lochs meet Loch Duich, Loch Long, and Loch Alsh, Highlands, Scotand. https://pin.it/43Fh9OT

associatedMedia.headline: Eilean Donan Castle, Donan, Isle of Skye, Scotland
associatedMedia.description:
History
The name Eilean Donan, or island of Donan, is most probably called after the 6th century Irish Saint, Bishop Donan who came to Scotland around 580 AD. There are several churches dedicated to Donan in the area and it is likely that he formed a small cell or community on the island during the late 7th century.

associatedMedia.headline: WHY IS IT THAT MY HEART STIRS WHEN I HEAR BAGPIPES?

zh.lifeSummary: 當Fynvola MacLeod於1320年出生在英國蘇格蘭Comhairle nan Eilean Siar易斯爾 本 劉易斯時，她的父親Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes30歲，母親Dorothea O Beolan Ross30歲。她於大約1339年與Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1346年在蘇格蘭享年26歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

en.lifeSummary: When Fynvola MacLeod was born in 1320, in Isle of Lewis, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes, was 30 and her mother, Dorothea O Beolan Ross, was 30. She married Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail about 1339, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1346, in Scotland, at the age of 26, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fynvola MacLeod est née en 1320, à Isle of Lewis, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Dorothea O Beolan Ross, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail environ 1339, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1346, à Écosse, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.Isle of Lewis, Outer Hebrides, Scotland,: Isle of Lewis, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Fynvola MacLeod 1320 in Isle of Lewis, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes 30 und ihre Mutter Dorothea O Beolan Ross 30. Sie hat um 1339 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1346 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail circa 1339, nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1346, nel Scotland, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ko.Isle of Lewis, Outer Hebrides, Scotland,: 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 이슬일 프 루이스
ko.lifeSummary: Fynvola MacLeod(이)가 1320년 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 이슬일 프 루이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothea O Beolan Ross(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1339년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1346년 스컷랜드에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fynvola MacLeod nasceu em 1320, em Isle of Lewis, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Dorothea O Beolan Ross, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail aproximadamente 1339, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1346, em Scotland, com 26 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.Isle of Lewis, Outer Hebrides, Scotland,: исл оф львис, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fynvola MacLeod родилась в 1320 г. в местности исл оф львис, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothea O Beolan Ross, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Kenneth MacKenzie 3rd Laird of Kintail около 1339 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1346 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 26 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
